headline: Sewage Treatment Plants Fail Affecting 2.3 Million People
context: IWK reported 380 of 6,800 sewage treatment plants operated below compliance affecting 2.3 million people in 2025.

cards.big: 380 sewage plants failed compliance affecting 2.3 million Malaysians
cards.sub: Partially treated discharge contaminates rivers used for drinking water

cards.big: IWK spent RM1.4 billion on maintenance but upgrade backlog is RM8.5 billion
cards.sub: Average age of failing plants is 28 years beyond 20-year design lifespan

cards.big: DOE recorded 2,800 river pollution incidents linked to sewage in 2025
cards.sub: 15 public water intakes temporarily shut due to contamination events

cards.big: 32% of households still served by individual septic tanks not centralized sewage
cards.sub: Rural and semi-urban areas lack sewage infrastructure entirely in many places

cards.big: Sewage failure tests whether waste treatment is funded as essential infrastructure
2.3 million people affected by sewage failures. Treatment plant maintenance is not optional infrastructure spending.
